sql_array: CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, XMLVAL XMLType);

SELECT XMLType.getClobVal(e.XMLVAL) AS CLIP_RESULT FROM (SELECT XMLVAL FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND e.I IN (SELECT I FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE XMLVAL.existsNode('/po')));
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL, XMLType.getClobVal(e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename')) AS ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND xml_tree_doc(XMLType.getClobVal(e.XMLVAL)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.I, XMLType.getClobVal(e.XMLVAL), xml_tree_doc('' || e.I || '') FROM TEST_XMLS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND e.I < 3;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EMP_COUNT FROM TEST_XMLS AS e GROUP BY e.I HAVING SUM(e.I) < 5;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getClobVal(), COUNT(*) OVER() as TOTAL FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') ORDER BY e.I DESC;
SELECT * FROM TEST_XMLS where XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/ename') AND xml_tree_doc(XMLType.getClobVal(XMLVAL)) IS NOT NULL AND I IN (SELECT MIN(I) FROM TEST_XMLS);
